description_long: This is a modern two-part cabinet and shelf unit, featuring a lower section with open shelving and a black countertop, and an upper wall-mounted shelf with multiple compartments. The lower unit has a central vertical panel in a light wood finish, flanked by open white shelves, and includes a circular cutout on the right side of the countertop, possibly for a sink or bin. The upper section is divided into several compartments, including a dish rack area and smaller cubby shelves, all framed in a light wood material. The back and sides of both units are finished in a light wood veneer, while the shelving surfaces are white, creating a clean, minimalist aesthetic. The overall design is functional and visually balanced, suitable for use in urban kitchens, break rooms, or communal spaces. No visible handles or glass panels are present, and the object appears to be constructed primarily from wood and laminate materials.
description: A modern two-part cabinet and shelf unit with open shelving, a black countertop, and light wood accents, suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing open shelving, a black countertop with a circular cutout, and an upper wall-mounted shelf with multiple compartments.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of both the lower and upper units, with the circular cutout on the countertop visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain light wood back panels of both the upper and lower units, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the cabinet and shelf, with the black countertop and upper shelf depth visible.
